title: Withania schottiana
intro: Withania schottiana, also known as Dwarf Winter Cherry, is a perennial shrub native to India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the Solanaceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Its bioactive constituents, such as withanolides, flavonoids, and alkaloids, are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, Withania schottiana is commonly used to make herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and supplements, often in combination with other herbs to support overall well-being.
